Re-Notice Of Motion To Stop Unauthorized Wage Garnishment And Tax Interceptions, Provide Accounting And Release Passport
Off Calendar Sep-29-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ANTHONY OSMUND, TEL. NO. 585-0490, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY OSMUND'S Re-Notice Of Motion To Stop Unauthorized Wage Garnishment And Tax Interceptions, Provide Accounting And Release Passport IS OFF CALENDAR. CASE DISMISSED BY COURT ON SEPTEMBER 8, 2009. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Court'S Own Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Bring Case To Trial Within 5 Years, Pursuant To Ccp 581(B)(4) (As Notified In Open Court And Added To Calendar On 08/10/09)
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: (416) 09/08/2009
(Wightman) Clerk: Priscilla Agbunag; Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian CSR # 12355. General advisement given re: Commissioner Rebecca Wightman as Judge Pro Tempore. Petitioner present; Respondent not present; CSA = Spraggins. Matter on calendar for Court'S Own Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Bring Case To Trial Within 5 Years, Pursuant To Ccp 581(B)(4) (As Notified In Open Court And Added To Calendar On 08/10/09). The Findings and Orders of the Court were signed and filed in court this day, and are incorporated herein by reference.

Notice Of Motion To Stop Unauthorized Wage Garnishment And Tax Interceptions, Provide Accounting And Release Passport
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF ANTHONY OSMUND'S Motion To Stop Unauthorized Wage Garnishment And Tax Interceptions, Provide Accounting And Release Passport IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPT 416. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)

Notice Of Motion To Stop Unauthorized Wage Garnishment And Tax Interceptions, Provide Accounting And Release Passport (As The Issue Is Transferred From The Law & Motion Dept. 301 To Dept. 416, Per Tentative Ruling)
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: (416) 08/10/2009
(Wightman) Clerk: Kevin M. Lee; Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian CSR # 12355. General advisement given re: Commissioner Rebecca Wightman as Judge Pro Tempore. Mother not present; Father present, In Pro Per; Sylvia Archibeque (mother related to other child support case/issues) present; CSA = Saporito. Matter is on calendar for motion to stop unauthorized wage garnishment and tax intercepts, and to provide accounting and release passport (as the issue was transferred by Law & Motion Dept. 301). Motion is denied. The Findings and Orders of the Court were signed and filed in court this day, and are incorporated herein by reference.

Court'S Own Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Bring Case To Trial Within 5 Years, Pursuant To Ccp 581(B)(4) (As Notified In Open Court And Added To Calendar On 08/10/09)
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Continued To Sep-08-09 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 416
MINI MINUTES: (416) 08/10/2009
(Wightman) Clerk: Kevin M. Lee; Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian CSR # 12355. General advisement given re: Commissioner Rebecca Wightman as Judge Pro Tempore. Mother not present; Father present, In Pro Per; Sylvia Archibeque (mother related to other child support case/issues) present; CSA = Saporito. Matter is added to calendar for the court's own motion to dismiss action for failure to bring case to trial within 5 years, pursuant to CCP 581(b)(4). Court provides motification to the parties in open court of its intent to dismiss the case. Matter continued to 09/08/09 @ 8:30AM in Room 416 by request of CSA = Saporito. The Findings and Orders of the Court were signed and filed in court this day, and are incorporated herein by reference.
